comment.text: This key is for a button labeled "Save & copy". It appears on a settings panel (likely within a modal) and is used to save changes and potentially initiate a copy action related to a link. Translators should ensure the text accurately conveys both saving and copying functionality.

usage.context:
<Button
 className="send-invitation"
 scale
 size={ButtonSize.normal}
 primary
 label={t("Common:SaveAndCopy")}
 type="submit"
 testId="link-settings_modal_save_button"
 isDisabled={hasError || showLimitError || showExpiredError}
 />
 <Button
